overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a vibrant field of red spider lilies, passing a wooden cart, and continuing along the edge of a lake covered in lily pads. The scene features lush vegetation, distant mountains, and clear blue skies with cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense field of red spider lilies with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dense red flower field toward the distant trees

entered.detail: dense carpet of bright red flowers covering the ground
tall green trees with full foliage scattered throughout the field
ancient stone wall partially visible through the trees
distant mountain peaks visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense field of vibrant red spider lilies under a clear blue sky. Tall deciduous trees are scattered throughout the landscape, with a stone wall ruin visible in the distance to the left and mountains looming on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between flower field and lakeside

events.description: wooden cart with large wheels comes into view on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking past a wooden cart while approaching the water's edge

entered.detail: traditional wooden wagon with large spoked wheels sitting among the flowers
calm blue water becoming visible through the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the red flowers, passing a traditional wooden cart on the left. The lake water becomes visible in the distance as the field begins to transition to the water's edge, with the stone wall ruin disappearing behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside shore with lily pad covered water

events.description: ground transitions from red flowers to grassy lakeshore with lily pads

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge observing the lily pads and distant mountains

entered.detail: green lily pads floating on the water's surface near the shore
grassy bank transitioning from the flower field to the water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the red flower field onto a grassy lakeshore covered in lily pads. The wooden cart and flower field fall behind as the view opens up to reveal the expanse of the lake with mountains visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lake view with distant mountains

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky above the lake

agents.ego_description: continuing along the lakeshore with a clear view of the mountains and watching birds fly overhead

entered.detail: flock of birds flying across the sky above the lake surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open lakeshore with an unobstructed view of the water and distant mountains. A flock of birds flies across the sky as the lily pads continue along the water's edge to the right, creating a serene natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense field of red spider lilies that gradually opens into a serene lakeshore landscape. It begins with the character walking through vibrant red flowers under a clear blue sky, with scattered deciduous trees and a distant stone wall ruin set against looming mountains. As the character continues forward, the camera passes a traditional wooden cart on the left while the flower field begins to transition toward the shimmering edge of a lake. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the lilies onto a grassy shore covered in lily pads, leaving the cart and ruins behind to reveal the full expanse of the water. Finally, the view opens completely to an unobstructed vista of the lake and distant mountains as a flock of birds flies across the sky.
